title: Synthetic fixture: v4 metrics block with only the review credit pre-populated (D9 additive-merge)
body:
## Summary

Synthetic v4 fixture for additive-merge (D9) validation.
The pipeline-metrics block carries only the review credit row.
The back-deriver must fill in the remaining 11 ports without overwriting review.

Refs #500

<!-- pipeline-metrics
metrics_version: 4
credits:
  - port: review
    status: passed
    evidence: "Full review pipeline completed: prosecution x3, defense, judgment."
-->
